prose.en: Implement {param:au-16.03_odp} to disassociate individuals from audit information transmitted across organizational boundaries.

guidance.en: Preserving identities in audit trails could have privacy ramifications, such as enabling the tracking and profiling of individuals, but may not be operationally necessary. These risks could be further amplified when transmitting information across organizational boundaries. Implementing privacy-enhancing cryptographic techniques can disassociate individuals from audit information and reduce privacy risk while maintaining accountability.

prose.en: {param:au-16.03_odp} are implemented to disassociate individuals from audit information transmitted across organizational boundaries.

objects.en: procedures addressing cross-organizational sharing of audit information
policy and/or procedures regarding the deidentification of PII
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for sharing cross-organizational audit information
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities

guidelines.en: measures to disassociate individuals from audit information transmitted across organizational boundaries are defined;
